name: ASR — New Leads Outreach Automation
description: Triggered when asr_lead_engine.py finds new leads. Sends WhatsApp + email sequence and updates Google Sheet status.

nodes.name: Webhook — New Leads Found
nodes.notes: POST from asr_scheduler.py when new leads are generated. Body contains { leads: [...], hot_leads: [...] }

nodes.name: WhatsApp — Send Candidate Preview to HR

parameter.name: text
parameter.value:
=Hi {{ $json.hr_name }},

I'm Srijan from AS Recruitment. We have pre-screened {{ $json.hiring_roles }} candidates ready for {{ $json.company }} in {{ $json.city }}.

Can I share 5 profiles today? Placement guaranteed in 48 hours.

— AS Recruitment

nodes.notes: Replace with official WhatsApp Business API or a service like Twilio/Wati for production

parameters.subject: Pre-screened {{ $json.hiring_roles }} candidates ready — {{ $json.company }}
parameters.text:
=Hi {{ $json.hr_name }},

I'm Srijan from AS Recruitment. We specialise in bulk hiring for BPO, hospital, and IT companies in {{ $json.city }}.

We have 5 pre-screened {{ $json.hiring_roles }} candidates ready this week:
- Communication score 3-5/5
- Night shift / day shift available
- Notice period: immediate to 2 weeks
- Salary range: matching your requirements

Can I share their profiles today?

Our model: ₹8,000–₹12,000 per successful hire. Free replacement within 30 days.

Reply YES or call me directly.

Best,
Srijan Ji
AS Recruitment
+91-XXXXXXXXXX

nodes.name: Google Sheets — Mark Email Sent
nodes.notes: Updates email_sent = Yes, linkedin_sent = Yes, deal_status = Email Sent in your tracker

nodes.name: Check — Did HR Reply?
nodes.notes: Read reply_received column. If still No, trigger follow-up.

parameters.subject: =Following up — {{ $json.hiring_roles }} candidates for {{ $json.company }}
parameters.text:
=Hi {{ $json.hr_name }},

Just following up on my message from 2 days ago. I still have those pre-screened {{ $json.hiring_roles }} candidates available.

I'm holding these profiles for {{ $json.company }} for 24 more hours.

Shall I send them across now?

Takes just 2 minutes to review — and I can schedule interviews this week.

Best,
Srijan
AS Recruitment

import_instructions: 4. Replace YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEET_ID with your actual sheet ID
5. Configure Google Sheets credentials in n8n
8. The webhook URL will appear — copy it to asr_scheduler.py N8N_NEW_LEADS_WEBHOOK
